title: Overly Decorated
description: Add a whole bunch of mods that make minecraft look and sound better.
body:
## 🌟 Make Minecraft Look Amazing!

Make Minecraft look stunning and sound amazing with the 20+ mods in this pack! Some shaders are included with the modpack.

### Included Shaders

- BSL Shaders
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound
- Noble
- Lymbo Shaders
- Pixel Perfect
